title: MGN 589 (F) Amendment 1 ILO Work in fishing convention: complaints
body: "This notice should be read with the Merchant Shipping (Work in Fishing Convention) Regulations 2018, the Merchant Shipping (Work in Fishing Convention) (Survey and Certification) Regulations 2018 and replaces MGN 589 (F).  Amendment 1 updates reference information only.  Notice to   fishing vessel owners operators and managers employers of fishermen skippers officers and fishermen on fishing vessels  "
